A powerful male human warlord with deep ebony skin and a shaved head covered in silver ritual tattoos, his steel-grey eyes piercing beneath a scarred brow. Ornate gilded plate armor with intricate sunburst engravings covers his massive shoulders, layered over crimson chainmail, a lion-fur battle-cloak clasped with rubies.

A massive male half-orc berserker with grey-green skin and prominent tusks, wild black hair in war-braids threaded with bone rings. A broken nose and ritual scars cover his brutal face. Spiked obsidian plate armor with runic inlays covers his hulking frame, a tattered banner-cloak bearing ancient symbols.

A rugged male dwarf champion with bronze skin and an elaborate beard braided with mithril rings and sapphire beads, amber eyes blazing with fury. Master-crafted plate armor engraved with mountain runes and gold filigree encases his stocky, massively-muscled body, a fur mantle across boulder-like shoulders.

A powerful male dark elf assassin with obsidian skin and long silver hair pulled into severe warrior knots, one ice-blue eye scarred shut. Black leather armor with platinum threading and poison-etched pauldrons clings to his lethal lean frame, a spider-silk cloak lined with darksteel daggers.

A massive male tiefling warlord with crimson skin and swept-back obsidian horns, his square jaw marked with infernal brand scars. Molten gold eyes burn with otherworldly intensity. Blackened plate armor with hellfire engravings and ruby-studded gauntlets covers his broad, battle-hardened physique.

A rugged male human berserker with pale Northern skin and a wild copper mane streaked with grey, ritualistic blue war paint across his weathered face. Ice-blue eyes gleam with barely-contained violence. Bear-fur layered over battle-worn chainmail and leather, iron-spiked bracers on massive forearms.

A powerful male elf blademaster with porcelain skin and waist-length platinum hair in intricate war-braids, his ageless face marked by a single diagonal scar. Emerald eyes hold ancient death. Elven-forged mithril plate with leaf patterns and jade inlays, a moonweave cloak across impossibly broad shoulders.

A massive male dragonborn conqueror with bronze-scaled hide and a ridged draconic skull, amber reptilian eyes smoldering with primal power. Dragon-bone pauldrons tower over his shoulders, enchanted scale-mail etched with flame runes covering his towering muscular frame, a battle-standard cape of wyrm-leather.

A rugged male human desert warrior with deep bronze skin and a shaved head showing burn scars, heterochromatic eyes of amber and steel. A braided black beard threaded with gold rings frames his broken nose. Scimitar-curved plate with turquoise inlays, layered silk and scale-mail beneath.

A powerful male half-orc warlord with iron-grey skin and a topknot of black hair bound with copper wire, tusks carved with victory marks. Dark brown eyes hold brutal intelligence. Orcish plate armor with conquered kingdom heraldry hammered into the metal, a blood-red commander's cloak.

A massive male tiefling gladiator with midnight-blue skin and curling ram horns wrapped in silver bands, his face a roadmap of arena scars. Blood-red eyes burn with defiance. Gladiatorial plate with crowd-favorite engravings, layered leather straps with trophy tokens, spiked shoulder guards.

A rugged male dwarf ironbreaker with pale skin and a waterfall beard braided in seven tiers with adamantine clasps and emeralds. One eye replaced by a rune-carved gemstone. Ancient dwarven plate covered in ancestral engravings and gromril layering, a drake-scale mantle across his trunk-like neck.

A powerful male drow weapon master with ash-grey skin and long white hair in a severe warrior's tail, spider-web tattoos across his chiseled features. Purple eyes gleam with predatory focus. Darksteel plate armor with spiderweb etchings and amethyst accents, a cloak of living shadows.

A massive male human knight-commander with olive skin and short-cropped iron-grey hair, his square jaw branded with a holy symbol. Steel-grey eyes radiate authority. Ornate paladin plate with gold filigree and sapphire-studded pauldrons, layered chainmail beneath, a white commander's cape with battle honors.

A rugged male elf ranger-lord with sun-bronzed skin and auburn hair in multiple warrior braids with silver leaves, ritual hunting tattoos along his temples. Hawk-like golden eyes. Masterwork elven leather and mithril scale with forest motifs, a leaf-weave cloak, antler-carved bracers on corded arms.

A powerful male dragonborn legionnaire with emerald scales and a crowned reptilian head, one horn broken in battle. Vertical-pupiled gold eyes smolder with draconic pride. Legion plate armor with dragon-script engravings and scale-layered pauldrons, a tattered crimson centurion cloak, enchanted war-harness.

A massive male human barbarian-king with pale scarred skin and a wild grey-blonde mane held by a crown of blackened iron, frost-blue eyes blazing. His weathered face bears ritual scars and a missing ear. Fur-layered plate with ice-etched runes, mammoth leather, bone trophy necklaces.

A rugged male tiefling inquisitor with purple skin and elegant backward-swept horns adorned with silver chains, a perfectly trimmed goatee with infernal piercings. Violet eyes burn with zealous intensity. Black plate armor with religious iconography in platinum, a crimson half-cape, consecrated gauntlets glowing with runes.

A powerful male dwarf thane with ruddy skin and a magnificent crimson beard in complex braids with gold and ruby clasps, battle-hymns tattooed on his thick neck. Brown eyes smolder beneath bushy brows. Royal dwarven plate with clan heraldry in precious metals, a hammer-bearer's harness, ermine shoulder cape.

A massive male dark elf warlord with jet-black skin and bone-white hair shaved on sides with a long topknot, slave-brand scars on his brutal features. Blood-red eyes promise violence. Spiked dark-iron plate with soul-gem accents, layered chain, a cape of flayed enemy banners.

A rugged male human swordmaster with East-Asian features and dark bronze skin, black hair in a warrior's knot with jade pins, a thin braided beard. Dark brown eyes hold lethal calm. Ornate lamellar armor with dragon engravings and gold lacquer, layered silk beneath, a general's sash.

A powerful male half-orc chieftain with forest-green skin and a wild black mohawk threaded with feathers and bones, ritual hunt tattoos covering half his face. Yellow eyes gleam with savage cunning. Tribal plate mixed with stolen knight-armor, bear-pelt cloak, tusk-decorated war harness.

A massive male elf war-priest with marble-pale skin and flowing silver hair adorned with blessed chains, his ageless face marked by a holy brand across one cheek. Opalescent eyes shine with divine power. Consecrated plate armor with angelic motifs in white gold, a blessed chainmail cassock, radiant pauldrons.

A rugged male dragonborn battlemage with obsidian scales and a horned serpentine head, arcane scars etched into his scaled hide. Glowing violet eyes pulse with magical energy. Enchanted dragon-scale robes reinforced with spelled-steel plates, runic bracers crackling with power, a sorcerer's war-cloak.

A powerful male human warlord with weathered Mediterranean features and grey-streaked black hair in a general's cut, a salt-and-pepper beard framing his scarred jaw. Hard brown eyes reflect countless battles. Conquered-kingdoms plate with mixed heraldry hammered together, a blood-stained crimson commander's cape, battle-crowned helm.
